name: Dolan’s
content: Dolan’s Bar, Warehouse, and Kasbah is probably the largest bar in Limerick. Along with weekly trad nights on Thursdays (where traditional Irish music is played as part of a tradition started in England), they host a wide variety of concerts, including the bi-annual Siege of Limerick metal festival. Fun place, worth checking out what their upcoming shows are or just showing up for a trad night.
